title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 443.370 - Penalty for overcharging
text:
443.370.  Penalty for overcharging. — Any person taking a larger compensation for his services, as aforesaid, shall be liable to any party interested in such writing, instrument or deed, in a sum double the amount taken for such services, recoverable by a suit in a court of competent jurisdiction.
(RSMo 1939 § 3480) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 3093; 1919 § 2252; 1909 § 2857
